summary: Backend testing for Compagnons (Zelda & Maddie). 10/10 pytest tests passed including pet seeding, full CRUD for rations/appointments/files/weights/journal/walks, and AI document analysis (claude-sonnet-4-6 via emergentintegrations) returning a French structured summary.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/appointments/{id} uses VetAppointmentCreate (full body) instead of a partial update model — clients must send all fields including done. Consider a separate Update model with Optional fields for partial updates.

GET endpoints with pet_id query parameter (rations, appointments, files, weights, journal, walks) make pet_id required without Query(...) annotation — will return 422 if omitted. Consider documenting or making optional with 'all pets' fallback.
list_files/get_file are not response_model typed — relies on Mongo doc shape. Acceptable but loses schema validation.
No global error handler for unexpected exceptions; only AI endpoint catches errors. Minor.
seed_pets runs on @app.on_event('startup') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handler (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: Pets auto-seeded by backend (Zelda dog + Maddie cat). All test rows prefixed TEST_ and deleted at end of each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. Frontend not tested. AI endpoint /api/ai/analyze-document works with real JPEG images containing text/shapes — do not use blank/solid color images. Pet IDs must be fetched dynamically from GET /api/pets (UUIDs).
